summary:
The presence of pustules along with gram positive cocci culture suggests possible GAS; confirming this requires performing a catalase test as it differentiates S.aureus from other coagulase-negative staphylococci including GAS. Agent1 identified that distinguishing through catalase testing is crucial for provisional confirmation due to its ability to differentiate these organisms effectively. 

Final Answer:\(\boxed{\text{catalase}}\)
